race.comment: SAINTLY SANDS (9) finds it tough to land her second win but looks very well placed here after flashing home into fifth in a strong CL1 last time at scone. Peaking now and gets in light with the 4kg claimer engaged. The one to beat.  WHITTELLO SUN (5) has been thereabouts in his last two since shedding the maiden tag at Muswellbrook. The form around him reads well for this and Northey reunites and gets the best out of this him. Can give this a big shake. GRANDE DIABLO (4) got off the mark over 1400m at Tamworth last start, scoring by a nose. Sparingly raced and has more to offer stretching to the mile third-up. ADAMANA (12) has caught the eye in her last two when closing off solidly from the back. Draws to go back again, so watch for her late.
